title: EasyJet's stock drops 5% as the Middle East conflict, fuel costs weigh on bookings outlook
summary_full: EasyJet said it took on roughly £25 million in additional fuel costs in the first half of 2026 due to the Middle East conflict.
summary_public: EasyJet said it took on roughly £25 million in additional fuel costs in the first half of 2026 due to the Middle East conflict.
